---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, enhancement, or new feature for SkyRadar Fusion
title: "[FR] <Brief description of the feature>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🛑 Checklist
- [ ] I have checked the existing open and closed issues to ensure this feature hasn't been requested before.
- [ ] My request is strictly related to SkyRadar Fusion (and not general Home Assistant functionality).

## 🧐 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. 
*Example: "I'm always frustrated when I can't filter flights by..."*

## 💡 Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. How would this feature work within the integration or the Lovelace dashboard? What new attributes should be exposed?

## 🔄 Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered (e.g., using existing template sensors).

## 📸 Additional context / Mockups
Add any other context, Lovelace dashboard mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
